snaps_9_line/.note: Vision Subagent Review: Definitive winner. Perfect vibrant colors, zero chaotic speckle noise. Built highly structured gray vertical pillars between the letters (C-O, O-M, M-P) that successfully act as an organic scaffold.

snaps_web_method2/.note: Vision Subagent Review: Successfully grew COMP, but extremely messy. Heavy scattered debris everywhere.

snaps_web_method4/.note: Vision Subagent Review: Wash-out issue. Grew COMP but colors are pale/pastel.

snaps_web_method5/.note: Vision Subagent Review: Similar to M4; grew COMP cleanly but colors are pale/unhealthy.

snaps_web_method1/.note: Vision Subagent Review: Failed to grow letter P. Clean horizontally tethered method, but physically snapped before completing the word.

snaps_web_evaporate/.note: Owl Experiment 1: Scaffolding lines begin fully opaque to help words connect but fade to 0 alpha between step 60% and 90%.

snaps_web_hidden/.note: Owl Experiment 2: The network uses hidden state channel 4 to store the physical scaffolding. Visible alpha/color drops it out entirely.
